@type.docs: The type of the serialized message.

__package__.yml.rawContents:
types:
  Metadata:
    type: map<string, nullable<MetadataValue>>
    encoding:
      proto:
        type: google.protobuf.Struct
  MetadataValue:
    discriminated: false
    union:
      - double
      - string
      - boolean
      - list<unknown>
    encoding:
      proto:
        type: google.protobuf.Value
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  Any:
    properties:
      '@type':
        type: optional<string>
        docs: The type of the serialized message.
    extra-properties: true
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
    encoding:
      proto:
        type: google.protobuf.Any

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
display-name: Test extension `x-fern-encoding` for schemas
